children.label: A
children.text: is capable of providing access to internet connections in individual locations; and

children.label: B
children.text: is an advanced telecommunications capability, as defined in .section 1302(d) of this title

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 2 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Communications Commission.

children.heading: Deployment Locations Map
children.label: 3 Deployment Locations Map
children.text: The term “Deployment Locations Map” means the mapping tool required to be established under subsection (b).

children.heading: Establishment of Deployment Locations Map
children.label: b Establishment of Deployment Locations Map
children.text: Not later than 18 months after , the Commission shall, in consultation with all relevant Federal agencies, establish an online mapping tool to provide a locations overview of the overall geographic footprint of each broadband infrastructure deployment project funded by the Federal Government.November 15, 2021
the centralized, authoritative source of information on funding made available by the Federal Government for broadband infrastructure deployment in the United States; and
made publicly available on the website of the Commission.

children.label: A
children.text: the Federal agency of jurisdiction;

children.label: B
children.text: the program title; and

children.label: C
children.text: the network type, including wired, terrestrial fixed, wireless, mobile, and satellite broadband infrastructure deployment;

children.label: A
children.text: company name;

children.label: B
children.text: duration timeline, including the dates of a project’s beginning and ending, or anticipated beginning or ending date;

children.label: C
children.text: total number of locations to which a project makes service available; and

children.label: D
children.text: relevant download and upload speeds; and
incorporates broadband service availability data as depicted in the Broadband Map created under .section 642(c)(1) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Commission shall, in consultation with relevant Federal agencies, ensure the Deployment Locations Map is maintained and up to date on a periodic basis, but not less frequently than once every 180 days.

children.heading: Other Federal agencies
children.label: 2 Other Federal agencies
children.text: Each Federal agency providing funding for broadband infrastructure deployment shall report relevant data to the Commission on a periodic basis.

children.heading: No effect on programmatic missions
children.label: f No effect on programmatic missions
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to affect the programmatic missions of Federal agencies providing funding for broadband infrastructure development.

children.heading: Nonduplication
children.label: g Nonduplication
children.text: The requirements in this section shall be consistent with and avoid duplication with the provisions of section 903 of division FF of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2021 () [].Public Law 116–26047 U.S.C. 1307

children.heading: Funding
children.label: h Funding
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated to carry out this division under this Act, $10,000,000 shall be made available to carry out this section.
